		"ch:backfill:status": "doppler run --project rudel --config ci -- bash -c 'CLICKHOUSE_DB=default bun --bun chkit backfill status \"$@\"' --",
		"ch:backfill:status:prd": "doppler run --project rudel --config prd -- bash -c 'CLICKHOUSE_DB=default bun --bun chkit backfill status \"$@\"' --",

   107→const rudel_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
   108→	database: "rudel",
   109→	name: "session_analytics_mv",
   110→	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
   111→	as: `
   112→  WITH
   113→    arrayFilter(
   114→      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'),
   115→      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
   116→    ) AS _interaction_lines,
   117→
   118→    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,
   119→
   120→    arrayMap(
   121→      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
   122→      _ts_lines
   123→    ) AS _timestamps,
   124→
   125→    arrayMap(
   126→      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'),
   127→      _ts_lines
   128→    ) AS _msg_types,
   129→
   130→    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
   131→      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
   132→      []
   133→    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
   134→
   135→    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
   136→      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant',
   137→        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
   138→      []
   139→    ) AS _inference_gaps,
   140→
   141→    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
   142→      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user',
   143→        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
   144→      []
   145→    ) AS _human_gaps,
   146→
   147→    arrayFilter(
   148→      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'),
   149→      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
   150→    ) AS _assistant_lines,
   151→
   152→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
   153→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
   154→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
   155→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
   156→
   157→    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills,
   158→    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types,
   159→    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
   160→
   161→    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
   162→    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
   163→    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
   164→
   165→  SELECT
   166→    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
   167→    _session_date as session_date,
   168→    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
   169→    'claude_code' as source,
   170→    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
   171→    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
   172→    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
   173→    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
   174→    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
   175→    _skills as skills,
   176→    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
   177→    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
   178→    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
   179→    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
   180→    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
   181→    if(
   182→      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
   183→      toFloat64(arrayElement(
   184→        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
   185→        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
   186→      )),
   187→      0
   188→    ) as median_period_sec,
   189→    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
   190→    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
   191→    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
   192→    toUInt32(
   193→      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
   194→      + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
   195→    ) as error_count,
   196→    JSONExtractString(
   197→      JSONExtractRaw(
   198→        arrayElement(
   199→          arrayFilter(
   200→            x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant',
   201→            splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
   202→          ),
   203→          -1
   204→        ),
   205→        'message'
   206→      ),
   207→      'model'
   208→    ) as model_used,
   209→    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
   210→    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
   211→    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
   212→    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
   213→    CASE
   214→      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
   215→          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
   216→          AND _output_tokens > 1000
   217→      THEN 'quick_win'
   218→      WHEN _duration_min > 30
   219→          AND _output_tokens > 50000
   220→          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
   221→      THEN 'deep_work'
   222→      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
   223→          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
   224→          AND _duration_min > 20
   225→      THEN 'struggle'
   226→      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3
   227→          AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '')
   228→          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000
   229→      THEN 'exploration'
   230→      WHEN _duration_min < 3
   231→          AND _output_tokens < 500
   232→      THEN 'abandoned'
   233→      ELSE 'standard'
   234→    END as session_archetype,
   235→    toUInt8(round(
   236→      50
   237→      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
   238→      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
   239→      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
   240→      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
   241→      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
   242→      - (least(toUInt32(
   243→          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
   244→          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
   245→        ), 10) * 2)
   246→    )) as success_score
   247→
   248→  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
   249→  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
   250→  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,
   251→});
   252→
   253→export default schema(rudel_session_analytics, rudel_session_analytics_mv);
   254→

     4→const rudel_codex_sessions = table({

    12→const codex_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
    13→	database: "rudel",
    14→	name: "codex_session_analytics_mv",
    15→	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
    16→	as: `
    17→  WITH
    18→    arrayFilter(
    19→      x -> x != '',
    20→      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    21→    ) AS _all_lines,
    22→
    23→    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _all_lines) AS _ts_lines,
    24→
    25→    arrayMap(
    26→      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
    27→      _ts_lines
    28→    ) AS _timestamps,
    29→
    30→    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
    31→      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
    32→      []
    33→    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
    34→
    35→    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
    36→      arrayMap(i -> if(i < length(_timestamps),
    37→        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
    38→      []
    39→    ) AS _inference_gaps,
    40→
    41→    arrayFilter(
    42→      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'response_item' OR JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'event_msg',
    43→      _all_lines
    44→    ) AS _interaction_lines,
    45→
    46→    arrayFilter(
    47→      x -> position(x, '"turn.completed"') > 0 OR position(x, '"response.completed"') > 0,
    48→      _all_lines
    49→    ) AS _completion_lines,
    50→
    51→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    52→    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    53→
    54→    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    55→    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    56→    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min,
    57→
    58→    JSONExtractString(
    59→      JSONExtractRaw(
    60→        arrayElement(
    61→          arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'session_meta', _all_lines),
    62→          1
    63→        ),
    64→        'payload'
    65→      ),
    66→      'model_provider'
    67→    ) AS _model_provider

    69→  SELECT
    70→    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),

    72→    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    73→    'codex' as source,
    74→    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    75→    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    76→    toUInt64(0) as cache_read_input_tokens,
    77→    toUInt64(0) as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    78→    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    79→    [] :: Array(String) as skills,
    80→    [] :: Array(String) as slash_commands,
    81→    [] :: Array(String) as subagent_types,
    82→    map() as subagents,
    83→    toUInt32(length(_interaction_lines)) as total_interactions,
    84→    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    85→    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    86→    if(
    87→      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
    88→      toFloat64(arrayElement(
    89→        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
    90→        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
    91→      )),
    92→      0
    93→    ) as median_period_sec,
    94→    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    95→    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,

    97→    toUInt32(
    98→      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"status":"failed"'))

   100→    ) as error_count,

   102→    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
   103→    toUInt8(0) as used_plan_mode,
   104→    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
   105→    toUInt32(0) as human_duration_sec,
   106→    CASE
   107→      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
   108→          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
   109→          AND _output_tokens > 1000
   110→      THEN 'quick_win'
   111→      WHEN _duration_min > 30
   112→          AND _output_tokens > 50000
   113→          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
   114→      THEN 'deep_work'
   115→      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
   116→          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
   117→          AND _duration_min > 20
   118→      THEN 'struggle'
   119→      WHEN _duration_min < 3
   120→          AND _output_tokens < 500
   121→      THEN 'abandoned'
   122→      ELSE 'standard'
   123→    END as session_archetype,
   124→    toUInt8(round(
   125→      50
   126→      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
   127→      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
   128→      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
   129→      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
   130→      - (least(toUInt32(
   131→          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"status":"failed"'))
   132→          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"error"'))
   133→        ), 10) * 2)
   134→    )) as success_score

## Summary: ClickHouse Schema Analysis

I've thoroughly examined the schema definition files, configuration, and migration history. Here's what I found:

### Current Schema Structure (After Latest Migration)

The schema consists of 3 tables and 2 materialized views in the `rudel` database:

**1. Tables:**
- `rudel.claude_sessions` - Main source table for Claude Code sessions
- `rudel.codex_sessions` - Source table for Codex sessions  
- `rudel.session_analytics` - Aggregated analytics table populated by materialized views

**2. Materialized Views:**
- `rudel.session_analytics_mv` - Transforms `claude_sessions` data into analytics
- `rudel.codex_session_analytics_mv` - Transforms `codex_sessions` data into analytics

### Repository Column Removal History

**Status:** The `repository` column has been **completely removed** from all tables as of the latest migration (2026-03-03T18:10:35).

**Migration Timeline:**
- **First Migration (20260303160252_auto.sql)** - Created initial schema WITH the `repository` column as `Nullable(String)` in all three tables and an index `idx_repository` on the analytics table
- **Second Migration (20260303181035_auto.sql)** - Dropped the `repository` column from all tables and dropped the `idx_repository` index

**Detailed Removal:**
```sql
-- From 20260303181035_auto.sql:
ALTER TABLE rudel.claude_sessions DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `repository`;
ALTER TABLE rudel.codex_sessions DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `repository`;
ALTER TABLE rudel.session_analytics DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS `repository`;
ALTER TABLE rudel.session_analytics DROP INDEX IF EXISTS `idx_repository`;
```

### Materialized View Definitions

**File:** `/Users/marc/Workspace/rudel/packages/ch-schema/src/db/schema/session-analytics.ts`

Both MVs follow the same pattern:
1. They parse the `content` JSON field (session transcript) into structured columns
2. They extract metrics like token counts, response times, skills used, and session archetypes

content.content:
$ doppler run --project rudel --config ci -- bash -c 'CLICKHOUSE_HOST=${CLICKHOUSE_URL#https://} CLICKHOUSE_USER=$CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME CLICKHOUSE_SECURE=true CLICKHOUSE_PORT=443 chcli "$@"' -- -q "SHOW CREATE TABLE rudel.session_analytics_mv" -F json
{
	"meta":
	[
		{
			"name": "statement",
			"type": "String"
		}
	],

	"data":
	[
		{
			"statement": "CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW rudel.session_analytics_mv TO rudel.session_analytics
(
    `session_id` String,
    `organization_id` String,
    `project_path` String,
    `repository` Nullable(String),
    `git_remote` String,
    `package_name` String,
    `package_type` String,
    `content` String,
    `ingested_at` DateTime64(3, 'UTC'),
    `user_id` String,
    `git_branch` Nullable(String),
    `git_sha` Nullable(String),
    `tag` Nullable(String),
    `subagents` Map(String, String),
    `session_date` DateTime64(3),
    `last_interaction_date` DateTime64(3),
    `source` String,
    `input_tokens` UInt64,
    `output_tokens` UInt64,
    `cache_read_input_tokens` UInt64,
    `cache_creation_input_tokens` UInt64,
    `total_tokens` UInt64,
    `skills` Array(String),
    `slash_commands` Array(String),
    `subagent_types` Array(String),
    `total_interactions` UInt32,
    `actual_duration_min` UInt32,
    `avg_period_sec` Float64,
    `median_period_sec` Float64,
    `quick_responses` UInt32,
    `normal_responses` UInt32,
    `long_pauses` UInt32,
    `error_count` UInt32,
    `model_used` String,
    `has_commit` UInt8,
    `used_plan_mode` UInt8,
    `inference_duration_sec` UInt32,
    `human_duration_sec` UInt32,
    `session_archetype` String,
    `success_score` UInt8
)
AS WITH
    arrayFilter(x -> (JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant')), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _interaction_lines,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,
    arrayMap(x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')), _ts_lines) AS _timestamps,
    arrayMap(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'), _ts_lines) AS _msg_types,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i + 1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(((_msg_types[i]) = 'user') AND ((_msg_types[i + 1]) = 'assistant'), dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i + 1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _inference_gaps,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(((_msg_types[i]) = 'assistant') AND ((_msg_types[i + 1]) = 'user'), dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i + 1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _human_gaps,
    arrayFilter(x -> ((JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant') AND JSONHas(x, 'message')), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _assistant_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> (x != ''), extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> (x != ''), extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> (x != ''), extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date AS session_date,
    _last_interaction_date AS last_interaction_date,
    'claude_code' AS source,
    _input_tokens AS input_tokens,
    _output_tokens AS output_tokens,
    _cache_read AS cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation AS cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens AS total_tokens,
    _skills AS skills,
    _slash_commands AS slash_commands,
    _subagent_types AS subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) AS total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) AS actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) AS avg_period_sec,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0) AS median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> (x < 5), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> ((x >= 5) AND (x <= 60)), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> (x > 300), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS long_pauses,
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))) AS error_count,
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> (JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model') AS model_used,
    toUInt8(if((cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.git_sha != ''), 1, 0)) AS has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) AS used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) AS inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) AS human_duration_sec,
    multiIf((_duration_min <= 10) AND ((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000) AND (_output_tokens > 1000), 'quick_win', (_duration_min > 30) AND (_output_tokens > 50000) AND (cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.git_sha != ''), 'deep_work', ((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000) AND ((_output_tokens / nullIf(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3) AND (_duration_min > 20), 'struggle', (length(_skills) >= 3) AND ((cs.git_sha IS NULL) OR (cs.git_sha = '')) AND ((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000), 'exploration', (_duration_min < 3) AND (_output_tokens < 500), 'abandoned', 'standard') AS session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round((((((50 + if((cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.git_sha != ''), 20, 0)) + if((_output_tokens / nullIf(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)) - if(((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000) AND ((cs.git_sha IS NULL) OR (cs.git_sha = '')), 20, 0)) - if((_duration_min < 2) AND (_output_tokens < 200), 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))), 10) * 2))) AS success_score
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
QUALIFY row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1"
		}
	],

	"rows": 1,

	"statistics":
	{
		"elapsed": 0.006611485,
		"rows_read": 1,
		"bytes_read": 6735
	}
}

content.text:
The live MV has `repository Nullable(String)` in its column list. The MV uses `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)` from `claude_sessions`, so it picks up `repository` from the source table. We need to drop and recreate the MV without `repository` before dropping the column.

Let me also check if there's a codex MV.

input.command: bun run chcli -- -q "SHOW CREATE TABLE rudel.codex_session_analytics_mv" -F json 2>&1 | head -20
input.description: Check codex MV definition on staging

content.content:
$ doppler run --project rudel --config ci -- bash -c 'CLICKHOUSE_HOST=${CLICKHOUSE_URL#https://} CLICKHOUSE_USER=$CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME CLICKHOUSE_SECURE=true CLICKHOUSE_PORT=443 chcli "$@"' -- -q "SHOW CREATE TABLE rudel.codex_session_analytics_mv" -F json
{
	"meta":
	[
		{
			"name": "statement",
			"type": "String"
		}
	],

	"data":
	[
		{
			"statement": "CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW rudel.codex_session_analytics_mv TO rudel.session_analytics
(
    `session_id` String,
    `organization_id` String,
    `project_path` String,
    `repository` Nullable(String),
    `git_remote` String,
    `package_name` String,
    `package_type` String,
    `content` String,
    `ingested_at` DateTime64(3, 'UTC'),
    `user_id` String,
    `git_branch` Nullable(String),
    `git_sha` Nullable(String),
    `tag` Nullable(String),
    `session_date` DateTime64(3),
    `last_interaction_date` DateTime64(3),
    `source` String,
    `input_tokens` UInt64,
    `output_tokens` UInt64,
    `cache_read_input_tokens` UInt64,
    `cache_creation_input_tokens` UInt64,
    `total_tokens` UInt64,
    `skills` Array(String),
    `slash_commands` Array(String),
    `subagent_types` Array(String),
    `subagents` Map(Nothing, Nothing),
    `total_interactions` UInt32,
    `actual_duration_min` UInt32,
    `avg_period_sec` Float64,
    `median_period_sec` Float64,
    `quick_responses` UInt32,
    `normal_responses` UInt32,
    `long_pauses` UInt32,
    `error_count` UInt32,
    `model_used` String,
    `has_commit` UInt8,
    `used_plan_mode` UInt8,
    `inference_duration_sec` UInt32,
    `human_duration_sec` UInt32,
    `session_archetype` String,
    `success_score` UInt8
)
AS WITH
    arrayFilter(x -> (x != ''), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _all_lines,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _all_lines) AS _ts_lines,
    arrayMap(x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')), _ts_lines) AS _timestamps,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i + 1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(i < length(_timestamps), dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i + 1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _inference_gaps,
    arrayFilter(x -> ((JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'response_item') OR (JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'event_msg')), _all_lines) AS _interaction_lines,
    arrayFilter(x -> ((position(x, '"turn.completed"') > 0) OR (position(x, '"response.completed"') > 0)), _all_lines) AS _completion_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min,
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> (JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'session_meta'), _all_lines), 1), 'payload'), 'model_provider') AS _model_provider
SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date AS session_date,
    _last_interaction_date AS last_interaction_date,
    'codex' AS source,
    _input_tokens AS input_tokens,
    _output_tokens AS output_tokens,
    toUInt64(0) AS cache_read_input_tokens,
    toUInt64(0) AS cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens AS total_tokens,
    CAST('[]', 'Array(String)') AS skills,
    CAST('[]', 'Array(String)') AS slash_commands,
    CAST('[]', 'Array(String)') AS subagent_types,
    map() AS subagents,
    toUInt32(length(_interaction_lines)) AS total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) AS actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) AS avg_period_sec,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0) AS median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> (x < 5), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> ((x >= 5) AND (x <= 60)), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> (x > 300), _prompt_periods_sec)) AS long_pauses,
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '"status":"failed"')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"error"'))) AS error_count,
    if(_model_provider != '', _model_provider, 'unknown') AS model_used,
    toUInt8(if((cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL) AND (cs.git_sha != ''), 1, 0)) AS has_commit,
    toUInt8(0) AS used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) AS inference_duration_sec,

const rudel_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "session_analytics_mv",
	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
	as: `
  WITH
    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _interaction_lines,

    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,

    arrayMap(
      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _timestamps,

    arrayMap(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _msg_types,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _inference_gaps,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _human_gaps,

    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _assistant_lines,

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,

    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,

    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min

  SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    'claude_code' as source,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    _skills as skills,
    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(
      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
      toFloat64(arrayElement(
        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
      )),
      0
    ) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(
      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
      + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
    ) as error_count,
    JSONExtractString(
      JSONExtractRaw(
        arrayElement(
          arrayFilter(
            x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant',
            splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
          ),
          -1
        ),
        'message'
      ),
      'model'
    ) as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
          AND _output_tokens > 1000
      THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30
          AND _output_tokens > 50000
          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
      THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
          AND _duration_min > 20
      THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3
          AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '')
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000
      THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3
          AND _output_tokens < 500
      THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(
          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
        ), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score

  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,
});

export default schema(rudel_session_analytics, rudel_session_analytics_mv);

import { materializedView, schema, table } from "@chkit/core";
import { baseSessionColumns, baseSessionTableConfig } from "./base-sessions.js";

const rudel_codex_sessions = table({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "codex_sessions",
	engine: "SharedReplacingMergeTree(ingested_at)",
	columns: [...baseSessionColumns],
	...baseSessionTableConfig,
});

const codex_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "codex_session_analytics_mv",
	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
	as: `
  WITH
    arrayFilter(
      x -> x != '',
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _all_lines,

    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _all_lines) AS _ts_lines,

    arrayMap(
      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _timestamps,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(i < length(_timestamps),
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _inference_gaps,

    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'response_item' OR JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'event_msg',
      _all_lines
    ) AS _interaction_lines,

    arrayFilter(
      x -> position(x, '"turn.completed"') > 0 OR position(x, '"response.completed"') > 0,
      _all_lines
    ) AS _completion_lines,

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'payload'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _completion_lines)) AS _output_tokens,

    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min,

    JSONExtractString(
      JSONExtractRaw(
        arrayElement(
          arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'session_meta', _all_lines),
          1
        ),
        'payload'
      ),
      'model_provider'
    ) AS _model_provider

  SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    'codex' as source,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    toUInt64(0) as cache_read_input_tokens,
    toUInt64(0) as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    [] :: Array(String) as skills,
    [] :: Array(String) as slash_commands,
    [] :: Array(String) as subagent_types,
    map() as subagents,
    toUInt32(length(_interaction_lines)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(
      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
      toFloat64(arrayElement(
        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
      )),
      0
    ) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(
      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"status":"failed"'))
      + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"error"'))
    ) as error_count,
    if(_model_provider != '', _model_provider, 'unknown') as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(0) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(0) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
          AND _output_tokens > 1000
      THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30
          AND _output_tokens > 50000
          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
      THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
          AND _duration_min > 20
      THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3
          AND _output_tokens < 500
      THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(
          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"status":"failed"'))
          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"error"'))
        ), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score

  FROM rudel.codex_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,
});

export default schema(rudel_codex_sessions, codex_session_analytics_mv);

toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses, toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ) as error_count, JSONExtractString( JSONExtractRaw( arrayElement( arrayFilter( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content) ), -1 ), 'message' ), 'model' ) as model_used, toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit, toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode, toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec, toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec, CASE WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win' WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work' WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle' WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration' WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned' ELSE 'standard' END as session_archetype, toUInt8(round( 50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ), 10) * 2) )) as success_score FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1;
